content_of_post_to_comment: I’m passionate about writing about life. About healing. About growing. About love, grief, hope, and all the strange chapters that make us human. Human beings fascinate me. And if my passion for these things disturbs you in any way, I have wonderful news. You can simply close your eyes. ‍
comment: When writing about healing and human mess, 'you can close your eyes' turns critique into an opt-out. It preserves voice, but also narrows what kinds of reply are invited.
